title: REAGENTS AND SOLUTIONS (Support Protocol 7.2)

guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2rfte","text":"Primers","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":7},{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c9f9j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2jb24","text":"CLYBL insertion of hNIL:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3vt7t","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b7msl","text":"C1          5'    TGACTAAACACTGTGCCCCA      3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cns3i","text":"C2          5'    AGGCAGGATGAATTGGTGGA     3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"562sm","text":"C3          5'    CAGACAAGTCAGTAGGGCCA    3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4u1d7","text":"C4          5'    AGAAGACTTCCTCTGCCCTC     3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6iv9i","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5bklq","text":"Run PCR products on 1 % agarose gel (Voytas, 2001). The C1/C2 primer pair will yield a 790-bp band if the cells have at least one wild-type allele (i.e., no insertion or heterozygous insertion). With homozygous insertion, no band will be produced. The C3/C4 pair will yield a band of 1080 bp with hNIL insertion to the CLYBL site; this band will be lost with successful Cre excision.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9a2j3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6em23","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"13igl","text":"CLYBL insertion of mag-hNIL:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":28}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4kel8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ci5ip","text":"C1          5'    TGACTAAACACTGTGCCCCA     3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1nac9","text":"C2          5'    AGGCAGGATGAATTGGTGGA     3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a0vb","text":"C3          5'    CAGACAAGTCAGTAGGGCCA    3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"98hs9","text":"CM4      5'    AGGCCTTCCATCTGTTGCT         3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b94p2","text":"CM5      5'    TGCCAAGTGGGCAGTTTAC        3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fr47l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2hkno","text":"Run PCR products on 1 % agarose gel (Voytas, 2001). The C1/C2 primer pair will yield a 790-bp band if the cells have at least one wild-type allele (i.e., no insertion or heterozygous insertion). With homozygous insertion, no band will be produced. The C3/CM4 pair will yield a band of 1410 bp with mag-hNIL insertion. Upon successful Cre excision, the C1/CM5 primer pair will amplify a product of 816 bp, with an amplicon at 4139 bp if editing does not occur.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"646s9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"mlrk","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dasrr","text":"AAVS1 insertion of NGN2:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b7pla","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ppju","text":"A1          5'    GGAATCTGCCTAACAGGAGGT    3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1pg5h","text":"A2          5'    CGGTTAATGTGGCTCTGGTT        3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4o58m","text":"A3          5'    CCCCCAGAATAGAATGACACC    3'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cd3d7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6fqi3","text":"Run PCR products on 1 % agarose gel (Voytas, 2001). The A1/A2 primer pair will yield a 163-bp band if the cells have no or heterozygous insertion of hNGN2 into AAVS1. With homozygous insertion, no band will be produced. The A2/A3 pair will yield a band of 1100 bp with hNGN2 insertion to the AAVS1 site that will be reduced to 229 bp with successful Cre excision at the loxP sites.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
